Bottom dimension chain (D to A, left to right): 2.90 | 1.10 (=4.00, gridD-gridC) | 2.00 (gridC-gridB) | 3.50 (gridB-gridA) | 1.00 | 0.50 (=1.50, beyond gridA), bracketed overall as 1.50 (left, beyond D) | 9.50 (gridD-A) | 1.50 (right, beyond A).

warnings: This cross-section (รูปตัด 2) cuts through the D-C-B-A row (bedroom 2, kitchen-prep, living/relax, porch), showing the roof's high/low bearing levels (+5.05/+4.05/+3.75) and referencing the eave details R1/R2 on sheet A-12 (page 14 in this extraction).

GRID-RELEVANT FOR หน้า00 MASTER (reporting only, master file not edited): the built roof/wall structure in this section extends only 1.50 m beyond grid A (matching dummy grid 'A'' at pos_m 11.0) — there is no second roof/wall line visible at 3.00 m beyond A (i.e. no structure at the master's tentative 'A''' pos_m 12.5). This independently supports the master file's own existing doubt on 'A''' ('tentative_may_just_be_building_edge_not_a_beam_line_needs_verification') — my read suggests 'A''' more likely represents a site/road-grading boundary from หน้า05 (ผังบริเวณ), not a second built support line, and its confidence_score in the master should probably stay low or be re-labeled rather than raised.
Sibling section รูปตัด 1 is in _หน้า09_section1.json.
The three stacked roof-level labels (+5.05, +4.05, +3.75) are small text stacked close together — read with medium-high confidence but worth a zoom check.

Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t2's หน้า09_section2.json — same content and dimension chain, no disagreement on the base numbers; the A'' interpretation note above is new analysis, not a correction of t2.
